summary: Heavy focus on a SaaS crypto trading platform rewrite, alongside embedded firmware for input emulation, a Windows input driver, and research into ML models for crypto and computer vision.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Built and iterated on a kernel-mode input filtering and injection driver for Windows, adding integration tests and a push-style event delivery library.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform
items.description: Worked extensively on a .NET rewrite of a crypto algo-trading platform, covering infrastructure, trading engine, billing, UI, and deployment pipelines.

items.title: ESP32-S3 input emulation firmware
items.description: Developed new firmware variants for an ESP32-S3-based mouse and keyboard emulation device.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging utility
items.description: Polished a Windows Explorer extension for tagging files and folders, including release workflows and property handling fixes.

items.title: CV and input emulation R&D project
items.description: Iterated on a personal R&D tool combining computer vision, input emulation, and screen overlay capabilities.

items.title: E-reader custom firmware
items.description: Enhanced custom firmware for an e-reader device with map rendering, a knowledge base app, and encoding support.

items.title: Proxy client fork
items.description: Updated a Clash proxy client fork with new transport support and API fixes.

items.title: Android LLM assistant
items.description: Built an on-device LLM chat assistant for Android with tool use, sub-agent delegation, and background processing.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Conducted machine learning experiments on crypto price prediction, iterating on mixture-of-experts architectures and ensemble methods.

items.title: E-reader custom firmware
items.description: Worked on custom firmware for an e-reader, adding map and knowledge base applications.

items.title: E-ink Android launcher
items.description: Developed a note-taking-centric launcher for E-ink Android devices.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging utility
items.description: Refined CI/CD pipelines and Microsoft Store publishing for a Windows Explorer file-tagging extension.

items.title: Graph-powered code intelligence engine
items.description: Expanded a code intelligence tool with LSP integration, more language support, and dead code detection.

items.title: Neovim configuration
items.description: Maintained a personal Neovim IDE setup with LSP, treesitter, and remote clipboard support.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Built a minimalistic, browser-based labeling tool for YOLO object detection datasets.

items.title: Computer vision for online poker
items.description: Developed a computer vision pipeline for analyzing online poker games, focusing on state recovery and hand history reconstruction.

items.title: n8n automation nodes
items.description: Updated custom n8n nodes for integrating AI coding agents into automation workflows.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform
items.description: Began a major .NET rewrite of a crypto algo-trading platform, completing initial project phases.

items.title: ESP32-S3 input emulation firmware
items.description: Iterated through multiple hardware revisions of an ESP32-S3 firmware for mouse, keyboard, and touch emulation.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding tool
items.description: Built an Electron-based tool for managing autonomous multi-session AI coding tasks with Git integration.

items.title: Freqtrade trading strategies
items.description: Developed and optimized numerous algorithmic trading strategies for the Freqtrade bot framework.

items.title: Telegram automation tooling
items.description: Built a multi-bot Telegram interface with a web dashboard for managing Freqtrade instances.

items.title: Flutter trading monitor
items.description: Created a Flutter mobile app for monitoring Freqtrade bot performance and trade summaries.

items.title: Telegram content collector
items.description: Worked on a Telegram content aggregation and forwarding service.

items.title: Telegram assistant bot
items.description: Maintained a Telegram bot for content summarization and multi-target message forwarding.

items.title: Freqtrade trading strategies
items.description: Developed and hyperopt-optimized trading strategies for the Freqtrade bot.

items.title: Crypto signaler Telegram bot
items.description: Built a Telegram bot for generating and formatting crypto trading signals with AI-powered analysis.

items.title: ChatGPT Telegram bot
items.description: Maintained a .NET Telegram bot providing ChatGPT access.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging utility
items.description: Worked on a Windows Explorer extension for tagging files and folders.
